question.label: Needed change
question.name: When you say 'what needed to change' — what felt unclear to you?
question.description: Clarifies the specific expectations or gaps he felt he was left to infer after the decision.

answer: I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.

assessment.note: He narrowed his focus to delivery because it felt controllable, which signals strong uncertainty about what mattered beyond execution; [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'delivery' as the controllable focus could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Unsaid piece
new_queue.name: What part of that decision feels most unfinished for you now?

new_queue.label: Mentoring fit
new_queue.name: How is the mentoring program fitting alongside your core product work right now?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
